title: Asymptotic Analysis Q3 - Matrix Upper Triangle with Diagonal Helper
general_notes: No double deduction (except in points 10 and 11).
Students can use Theta or big-O notation with tight bounds.
Combined and separated analyses of the nested loop are both acceptable.
Intended answers: T_f(N) = Theta(N^2) and T_g(N) = Theta(N).

rubric_points.name: Splitting code into parts + referencing line numbers
rubric_points.target: Clear separation of f and g; loops vs non-loop code identified; line numbers referenced consistently.

buckets.label: Wrong
buckets.description: Analysis does not clearly separate f vs g, or loops vs non-loops, and line numbers are unclear or missing.

buckets.label: Semi
buckets.description: Some attempt to separate components or refer to line numbers, but structure is incomplete or ambiguous.

buckets.label: Correct
buckets.description: Clear separation of f's nested loop and the call to g; line numbers referenced consistently.

rubric_points.name: Constant-time non-loop parts
rubric_points.target: All non-loop code in f and g is Theta(1).

buckets.label: Wrong
buckets.description: Non-loop code not analysed or incorrectly claimed to be non-constant.

buckets.label: Semi
buckets.description: Some constant-time segments identified but others missing or vaguely stated.

buckets.label: Correct
buckets.description: All non-loop regions stated as Theta(1).

rubric_points.name: f(): Nested loop iterations
rubric_points.target: Theta(N^2) combined iterations of the upper-triangle nested loops.

buckets.label: Wrong
buckets.description: Iteration count missing or not Theta(N^2) (e.g. claims Theta(N)).

buckets.label: Semi
buckets.description: States Theta(N^2) but with weak or incomplete justification (does not reference the j = i lower bound).

buckets.label: Correct
buckets.description: Justifies Theta(N^2) by summing N + (N-1) + ... + 1 = N(N+1)/2, or by stating outer Theta(N) x average inner Theta(N).

buckets.label: Wrong
buckets.description: Claims non-constant per-iteration cost, or does not clearly state it.

buckets.label: Semi
buckets.description: Suggests constant time but with incomplete reasoning.

buckets.label: Correct
buckets.description: States Theta(1), justified by one matrix access and one += assignment.

rubric_points.name: f(): Total loop cost
rubric_points.target: Theta(N^2) from Theta(N^2) iterations x Theta(1) per iteration.

buckets.label: Wrong
buckets.description: No multiplication of iteration count x per-iteration cost, or total complexity does not match own analysis.

buckets.label: Semi
buckets.description: Multiplies own values but final simplification or reasoning is unclear or incorrect.

buckets.label: Correct
buckets.description: Theta(N^2) x Theta(1) = Theta(N^2).

rubric_points.name: f(): Cost of Part C (call to g + constant work)
rubric_points.target: Theta(N), accounting for the cost of g plus the constant-time addition and return.

buckets.label: Wrong
buckets.description: Cost of Part C missing or incorrect.

buckets.label: Semi
buckets.description: Notes that cost comes from g but unclear about Theta(N).

buckets.label: Correct
buckets.description: Theta(N) for the call to g plus Theta(1) for the addition / return.

rubric_points.name: g(): Loop iterations
rubric_points.target: Theta(N) iterations of the diagonal for loop.

buckets.label: Wrong
buckets.description: Iteration count missing or not Theta(N).

buckets.label: Semi
buckets.description: States Theta(N) but explanation is unclear.

buckets.label: Correct
buckets.description: Justifies Theta(N) because i increments from 0 to N-1.

buckets.label: Wrong
buckets.description: Claims non-constant per-iteration cost.

buckets.label: Semi
buckets.description: Suggests constant time but lacks explicit justification.

buckets.label: Correct
buckets.description: Each iteration Theta(1): one matrix access mat[i][i] and one += assignment.

rubric_points.name: g(): Total loop cost
rubric_points.target: Theta(N) = Theta(N) iterations x Theta(1) per iteration.

buckets.label: Wrong
buckets.description: Does not combine iteration count x per-iteration cost.

buckets.label: Semi
buckets.description: Attempts multiplication using own values but unclear or incorrect.

buckets.label: Correct
buckets.description: Theta(N) x Theta(1) = Theta(N).

rubric_points.name: Overall worst-case runtime of g
rubric_points.target: T_g(N) = Theta(N), summing constant parts and the loop.

buckets.label: Wrong
buckets.description: Runtime absent or incompatible with earlier analysis.

buckets.label: Semi
buckets.description: States Theta(N) but with missing reasoning.

buckets.label: Correct
buckets.description: Theta(1) + Theta(N) + Theta(1) = Theta(N).

rubric_points.name: Overall worst-case runtime of f
rubric_points.target: T_f(N) = Theta(N^2), accounting for non-loop parts + nested loop + Part C.

buckets.label: Wrong
buckets.description: Final complexity missing/incorrect.

buckets.label: Semi
buckets.description: States Theta(N^2) but with missing reasoning.

buckets.label: Correct
buckets.description: Theta(1) + Theta(N^2) + Theta(N) = Theta(N^2), correctly absorbing the lower-order Theta(N).
